---
title: "Media"
editor: visual
---

Here are some of the news stories about me:

# My appointment as a Member of the Presidential (Transition Panel) National Unity Committee

[尹 인수위에 노태우 아들 노재헌, 터키 귀화인 카디르, 김민전 합류](https://www.chosun.com/politics/politics_general/2022/03/30/NDW233YX4NC75FVLIC57LUJXJ4/)

[**Ex-president's son, Turkey-born professor included in transition panel on national unity**](https://en.yna.co.kr/view/AEN20220330011000315)

I will add other news stories later.

For media inquires contact me via [email](mailto:ayhan@ewha.ac.kr).
